title: Mikm@thath #4366
definition:
Michmethah = "hiding place"

 1) a place in northeast Ephraim near the border of Manasseh between
    Shechem and Taanath-shilo
nasbUsage:

 1) a place in northeast Ephraim near the border of Manasseh between
    Shechem and Taanath-shilo

    NASB:  a place in N.E. Ephraim
